name: MEDIFAST INC
business: Medifast, Inc. is a health and wellness company that sells science-backed, coach-guided lifestyle systems for weight loss and metabolic health. Its products include OPTA VIA fuelings, plans, and programs. The company sells to individual consumers through a network of independent coaches.

exposures.sentence: The metabolic health system is designed for real life and built around four key components: Independent Coaches, Community, The Habits of Health Transformational System, Products & Plans.
We develop and market products for consumers who want to lose weight and adopt a holistic approach to overall health and wellness.
Our revenue is derived primarily from point of sale transactions executed over an e-commerce platform for weight loss, weight management, and other healthy living products.

Our operations depend on our ability to protect our information technology systems against damage from third-party cyber-attacks, such as hacking, spear phishing campaigns and denial of service attacks, which are increasingly negatively impacting companies.

The development, adoption and use of artificial intelligence ( AI ) technologies are rapidly transforming the health and wellness industry, enabling faster data analysis and automation through machine learning and predictive modeling.

catalysts.event: Launch of new product line incorporating next-generation ingredients for metabolic enhancement
catalysts.sentence: We expect to bring this new product line to market in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: addressable market for weight loss estimated to be worth over $30 billion
tamClaims.sentence: According to a proprietary analysis, the addressable market for weight loss is large and growing, estimated to be worth over $30 billion.
